title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXIX. Jingles.
content:
Hyder iddle diddle dell,
        A yard of pudding's not an ell;
        Not forgetting tweedle-dye,
        A tailor's goose will never fly.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXIX. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
